name: Pumpkin Polka-Dot Cake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg with the cake mix.
2. Add the pumpkin, butter, eggs, and water to the dry ingredients. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes. The batter will be very thick.
3. Stir in the nuts and chocolate pieces. Spread the batter evenly into a greased and floured 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes, or until done.
5. Cool on a wire rack. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
6. Cut the cake into squares. Makes about 2 dozen 2-inch squares.
